Enable 256-bit Bitlocker encryption on Windows 11 to boost security by Martin Brinkmann on Nov 25, 2023 in Security Windows 11 Help - 9 Bitlocker is the default encryption technology of the Windows operating system. It is used widely on Windows, but some users prefer third-party solutions, such as VeraCrypt. What many users of Bitlocker don't […] - gHacks

BLUFFS, which stands for Bluetooth Forward and Future Secrecy, is actually a set of six unique […] - gHacks
